name_en: Chane1️⃣23p Moon Bag🌙🤍L One look and I'm in love AS3917
name_cn:
Chane1️⃣23p Moon Bag🌙🤍L One look and I'm in love AS3917
Hardware is pale champagne, thin chain,
The SA styled it into a little moon, instantly melted my heart
Unquestionably the #1 cute bag of 23p e. Indeed, the end of buying bags isn't Hermès, it's Chanel seasonal pieces Al💕Size:15X20X6cm
